outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility regime. Positive GEX suppresses movement. Price pinned near gamma flip zone.
outlook.summary: Market in strong positive gamma regime (3.45B total). Spot hovering just above gamma flip at 593.02. Dealers long gamma will suppress volatility and pin price between 585 support and 600 resistance. Flat skew and neutral PCR confirm balanced conditions.

CONFLUENCE support. Significant put OI in 0DTE (8,066) and Monthly (66,109). Deep support level for tail risk hedging.

outlook.summary: Market is in a positive gamma environment with spot (6698.5) gravitating towards the 0DTE Max Pain at 6720. The massive Monthly Call Wall at 7000 creates a hard ceiling. Expect mean reversion and tight trading ranges.
